custom_attributes.value:
Even though plywood banquet tables are covered by linens, you cant hide from the importance of buying a table that will provide the return on investment that increases your profitability. Buying replacement tables in a couple of years is not the answer. Buy our rugged rectangle plywood banquet table and watch it perform well beyond your expectations!

72x30 Rectangle Heavy Duty Plywood Banquet Table with Metal Edges Product Information:

 6 Rectangle Plywood Banquet Table
 Seats up to 6 adults (3 on each side), increase to 8 by seating 1 person on each end
 Commercial grade, ¾ (.75) thick plywood (fits standard table skirt clips)
 4 Coats of Polyurethane on the top for water resistance
 2 Coats of Polyurethane on the bottom
 Aluminum C shaped protective edge that wraps around the table, not just the edge
 2 runners on the table bottom prevent warping and allow table stacking
 Powder coated legs to prevent rusting
 Posi-lock wishbone legs that fold easily but do not open during transport.
 Leg Color: Silver
 Replaceable non-marring floor caps, 1 diameter
 15 Gauge Steel Legs
 Designed to last 5-10 years
 100% bolt-through construction (not screws) for leg and runner attachment.
 Capacity: 560 lbs. static load.
 Weight: 45.00 lbs. (Ultra-Strong Design)
 Length: 72.00
 Width: 30.00
 Height: 30.00 (Industry Standard)
 Ships Assembled
 Warranty: 1 Year Limited Warranty

Attractive, comfortable resin folding chairs are the perfect seating solution for indoor or outdoor use! These resin folding chairs feature high quality padded seating surfaces and hardware, providing long-lasting comfort and durability. Excellent chair choice for caterers, rental chair stock, wedding and event facilities.
· Metal bracing in seat prevents breakage from rivet
· Double tubing throughout the lower portion of the legs guards against typical frame breakage
· Thick underseat rivets prevent separation

The driftwood cross back chair is a wonderful addition to the event and wedding industry.  It has been accepted greatly and is quickly becoming a standard which all event centers and equipment rental companies must have.  It is made of a high quality oak wood materials which looks like a high quality dining room chair.

Wood Cross Back Chair Product Information:

Material Type: Oak wood
Solid Oak wood construction
Stacks very efficiently up to 10 chairs.
Impact resistant feet at the bottom of each leg to prevent splintering.
Smooth edges and sleek design
Non-skid, non-marring feet
Warranty: 1 Year Limited Warranty
Weight: 9.50 lbs.
Overall Height: 34.00
Seat Height: 18.00
Overall Width: 16.75
Overall Length: 16.75

custom_attributes.value: Wood Folding Table banquet 72''x30'' 6ft Vinyl Edge
Wood Folding Table banquet 72''x30'' 6ft Vinyl Edge
Wood Folding Table banquet 72''x30'' 6ft Vinyl Edge

Attractive, comfortable resin folding chairs are the perfect seating solution for indoor or outdoor use! These resin folding chairs feature high quality padded seating surfaces and hardware, providing long-lasting comfort and durability. Excellent chair choice for caterers, rental chair stock, wedding and event facilities.
· Metal bracing in seat prevents breakage from rivet
· Double tubing throughout the lower portion of the legs guards against typical frame breakage
· Thick underseat rivets prevent separation

These resin folding chairs are a perfect fit for most applications. They are made to look identical to traditional wood folding chairs, in fact they have become the standard for garden folding chairs, perhaps the most popular padded wedding chair. Same weight and dimensions, but these chairs are stronger than any wood chair and will last through years of use.

These chairs are very easy to clean and maintain, they can be wiped off with a damp rag in between rentals or events.

The resin material is 100% virgin polypropylene with UV protectants included in the molding process. This ensures the chairs will not fade or lose their bright appearance over time.

The CTGO plastic folding chair is super lightweight folding chair. Each chair weighs in at an unbelievable 6.5 lbs.  Reinforced with 20 gauge annealed tempered steel. A reverse double-riveted cross-brace adds stability with non-marring foot caps to prevent unwanted floor scuffs. The seat and back are made from polypropylene for extra durability. The frame is powder-coated for protection against scratching and wear. These chairs can be conveniently stacked 65 high on our Heavy Duty Multi-Purpose Chair Dolly and still pass through any standard doorway.  Chair available in different colour.
